positive: A central, intricate mandala-style illustration combining botanical elements and celestial geometry. Depict a symmetrical arrangement featuring bioluminescent flora (such as glowing ferns and stylized lotus blooms) interwoven with abstract, geometric constellations and crystal lattice patterns. Use a deep indigo, sapphire blue, and ethereal teal color palette, highlighted by gold leaf accents for contrast. The composition must be highly detailed, clean, and suitable for textile printing, featuring strong, crisp silhouettes and a balanced circular layout. The style should be neo-geometric etching, resembling highly detailed stained glass or zentangle art, viewed under soft, dramatic backlighting. The design must be isolated on a clean, off-white background to ensure maximum print contrast and versatility.
negative: blurry, amateur, noise, grain, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, low resolution, out of focus, extra limbs, deformed, badly drawn, photorealistic, grainy, bokeh
